description_long: This is a rounded, bulbous vase with a narrow, flared neck and a smooth, matte surface. The body is nearly spherical, tapering gently into the neck, which rises vertically and widens at the mouth. Decorative sculpted elements resembling stylized animal or creature heads are attached at the shoulder, adding a unique ornamental touch. The vase is monochromatic, with a uniform off-white or pale gray color throughout. There are no visible painted patterns or glazes, giving it a minimalist and elegant appearance. The overall form suggests it is crafted from ceramic or porcelain, suitable for display in refined urban environments.
description: A smooth, rounded vase with a narrow flared neck and sculpted ornamental heads at the shoulder, finished in a uniform pale color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main sculpted head ornament and the full rounded body with the neck centered above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a secondary sculpted element and the curvature of the vase's body and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the vase with the neck and body, and the sculpted elements partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the secondary sculpted element and the smooth, continuous surface.
